programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: New thinking and technology are revolutionizing our cars, our cities, our way of life. Rev doesn't just want to know how fast we get from A to B, but how we get there as well. The world of cars and mobility is in flux. Rev casts a critical eye on new cars and examines climate-friendly solutions, looks into unusual new ideas and visions of the future. Take a spin through new possibilities every week with REV.

programme.title: Arts Unveiled

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

programme.title: History Stories
programme.desc: 1776 gave the words. 2026 tests the promise. We're dissecting the Declaration of Independence line by line with no dusty textbook energy, just real talk about power, freedom, and who America was actually built for.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: Informative and entertaining, In Good Shape reports on the most interesting developments in medicine, nutrition and fitness. In our regular interviews, we talk to medical professionals who give us their expert opinions. In Good Shape also debunks health myths and offers tips on what foods will give your body a boost - all based on the latest scientific insights.

programme.title: HER Women in Asia
programme.desc: Belonging A series that tells the stories of women from Asia who are breaking stereotypes and voicing their opinions loud and clear. In each episode, three women share their perspectives on universal and existential topics. The series portrays the lives of women from from all spheres of Asian societies, featuring protagonists from India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, the Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan and Thailand. What challenges do women scientists face, what stories do female politicians have to tell, and what impact do migration and poverty have on women? Find out on HER - Women in Asia.

programme.title: Images of War
programme.desc: Anja Niedringhaus devoted most of her professional life to photographing wars. Whether in Bosnia, Iraq, or Afghanistan, her images show the humanity amid the fighting. In 2014, she was murdered. To this day, the killing has left many questions unanswered.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: Espacio de Deutsche Welle que ofrece una selección de los mejores documentales y reportajes de actualidad sobre los acontecimientos más importantes del mundo político, empresarial, económico, deportivo o científico, entre muchos otros.

programme.title: Women as Commodities
programme.desc: Women in Latin America are recruited with brutal methods, then enslaved in Europe. A survivor recounts how she was lured to Spain with the promise of a job, then forced into prostitution.

programme.title: Best of DW-online Content
programme.desc: See the world differently: surprising stories, original analysis and news that matters.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. Our resident rapper, Killa Ace, shares his heartbreak after being prohibited from marrying the woman he loves due to their different tribes. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

programme.title: The Sacred Cows of the Mafia
programme.desc: In the southern Italian region of Calabria, in the municipality of Cittanova, hundreds of feral cattle are causing trouble. They're eating crops and causing accidents. The problem is a relic of the great Mafia wars and a legacy of the 'Ndrangheta clan.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. programme.title: IKEA Loves Wood
programme.desc: IKEA is one of the world's largest consumers of wood. Almost 15 million cubic meters of the material are used every year in cheap IKEA products - with millions of trees felled for the mass production machine.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: New thinking and technology are revolutionizing our cars, our cities, our way of life. Rev doesn't just want to know how fast we get from A to B, but how we get there as well. The world of cars and mobility is in flux. Rev casts a critical eye on new cars and examines climate-friendly solutions, looks into unusual new ideas and visions of the future. Take a spin through new possibilities every week with REV.

programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: Programa sobre ciencia centrado en la investigación científica, tanto en Alemania como en el resto de Europa. Los reportajes intentan ser lo más fáciles posibles y, al final de cada rograma se ofrece una entrevista con algún pionero en investigación.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: Informative and entertaining, In Good Shape reports on the most interesting developments in medicine, nutrition and fitness. In our regular interviews, we talk to medical professionals who give us their expert opinions. In Good Shape also debunks health myths and offers tips on what foods will give your body a boost - all based on the latest scientific insights.

programme.title: Best of the Qatar Economic Forum, Powered by Bloomberg

programme.title: Leaders with Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world's most influential minds?; in Leaders with Francine Lacqua, Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas; discover what inspires them, how they navigate power and the lessons they offer on defining success. Insightful, cinematic and elegantly crafted, "Leaders" goes beyond the headlines to reveal the human side of leadership.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers - leaders of some of America's biggest companies - in this interview show that aims to answer the question of what makes a great leader; Rubenstein uses his chats to explore successful leadership skills through the personal and professional choices made by the business world's most influential people; Rubenstein travels across the country to find out about the business leaders' stories and uncover information about their paths to success; the interview subjects include Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, Berkshire Hathaway chairman Warren Buffett and Pepsi CEO Indra Nooyi.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This Asian-focused version is hosted by Shery Ahn, David Ingles, Haidi Lun, Rishaad Salamat and Angie Lau. They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Live: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Bloomberg ETF IQ focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry; Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas are joined by leaders in this market.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar, David Gura. programme.title: Live: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Fort Apache
programme.desc: When arrogant and stubborn Civil War hero Lieutenant Colonel Owen Thursday (Henry Fonda) arrives in Arizona with his daughter, Philadelphia (Shirley Temple), to assume command of the Fort Apache outpost, he clashes with level-headed Captain Kirby York (John Wayne). Viewing the local Native Americans through an ignorantly negative lens, Thursday is determined to engage them in battle for his own glory, despite the warnings of York -- an act of folly that will have dire consequences.

programme.title: The Howards of Virginia
programme.desc: When his impoverished past is uncovered, Matt Howard is promptly fired by the Peytons, a wealthy family in Williamsburg during the Revolutionary War era. Undeterred, Matt returns to court the family's daughter, Jane, and the two marry and raise a family in the Virginia backwoods, infuriating the Peytons. The birth of a crippled son results in years of tension between Matt and Jane, and, when Matt decides to join the army, Jane makes a stunning decision.

programme.title: Count of Monte Cristo

When Edmond finally does break free, he locates the treasure and vows to avenge himself with it.

The nation's fathers harmonize their way through the founding of America in this musical adapted from a popular Broadway show. Colonial representatives gather in Philadelphia with the aim of establishing a set of governmental rules for the burgeoning United States. Benjamin Franklin (Howard da Silva) and John Adams (William Daniels) charge Thomas Jefferson (Ken Howard) with the work of writing a statement announcing the new country's emancipation from British rule.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: John Ford's landmark Western revolves around an assorted group of colorful passengers aboard the Overland stagecoach bound for Lordsburg, New Mexico, in the 1880s. An alcoholic philosophizer (Thomas Mitchell), a lady of ill repute (Claire Trevor) and a timid liquor salesman (Donald Meek) are among the motley crew of travelers who must contend with an escaped outlaw, the Ringo Kid (John Wayne), and the ever-present threat of an Apache attack as they make their way across the Wild West.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice

When the headstrong Maggie announces she intends to marry Henry's best employee, Will (John Mills), father and daughter engage in an intense showdown. programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Hoping to update his chapter on modern slang, encyclopedia writer Professor Bertram Potts (Gary Cooper) ventures into a chic nightclub. Inside, he meets the snarky burlesque performer "Sugarpuss" O'Shea (Barbara Stanwyck). Fascinated by her command of popular jargon, Potts invites her to stay with him. But, unknown to Potts, she is the fiancée of a mobster (Dana Andrews) and wanted by the police. In the ensuing mayhem, Potts must stay on his toes or be swallowed up by bigger fish.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In this sci-fi classic, a spacecraft travels to the distant planet Altair IV to discover the fate of a group of scientists sent there decades earlier. When Commander John J. Adams and his crew arrive, they discover only two people: Dr. Morbius and his daughter, Altaira, who was born on the remote planet. Soon, Adams begins to uncover the mystery of what happened on Altair IV, and why Morbius and Altaira are the sole survivors.

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: In London to claim an inheritance, Stan (Stan Laurel) misses out on the money but instead receives his own island. programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild. This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.title: Into High Country

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television - America's original and longest-running waterfowl series - brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DUTV is co-produced by MOOSE Media. The series' current stable of on-air personalities includes Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Colin Mulligan, Betsy Newbill, Dr. Karen Waldrop, Mike Stewart and Phil Bourjaily. With support from Drake Waterfowl Systems, Browning, Higdon, Purina, Tetra and Mossy Oak.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Come along with Jay and Wyatt Gregory as they share The Wild Outdoors!!! A bowhunting series in its 32nd year has something for everyone!!! The Wild Outdoors spotlights fair chase bowhunting across this great country, chasing everything from elk and antelope to turkeys and bear, with an emphasis on big mature whitetails in the Midwest!! Jay, Wyatt and the staff will take you along on hunts just the way they happen, from start to finish!!

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is not all about big racks.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: If it's an animal roaming the wild, Jim Shockey has probably hunted it. The veteran wilderness guide and outfitter has tracked game in more than 40 countries and taken in excess of 300 species using bow, muzzleloader and rifle. In addition, Shockey has exclusive guiding territories on Vancouver Island, in the Yukon Territory, in Mexico's Sonoran Desert, and in his native Saskatchewan, all of which helps supply content for the hunting adventures seen in this award-winning series. Jim's daughter Eva, a full-fledged hunter in her own right, joins her dad on many episodes.

programme.title: Into High Country

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend 2018, almost 10 inches of rain in two hours sends a monster wave of water through downtown Ellicott City, Md.; it traps tourists and business owners, sweeps vehicles away and collapses buildings.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On the rural floodplain of northwestern Kentucky, spring rains wash human bones from a culvert near where a missing man, Rodney "Bo" Hale, was last seen three years ago.

programme.desc: Easter Sunday brings a dangerous tornado spree to the southern states; a total of 140 tornados touch down across 10 states, inflicting catastrophic damage; major flooding in Indonesia leads to dramatic fast-water rescues.

programme.title: Pattrn
programme.desc: Elevating the conversation about climate, extreme weather, sustainability and green living.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: Tornadoes in outer space; a volcanic eruption that creates a sonic boom; a fog that overwhelms the Grand Canyon and makes it vanish from sight.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: A father and daughter are home when an EF4 tornado is headed straight for them; four friends are hiking in a canyon when a flash flood overtakes them.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: Towering dust storms engulf a road trip; crushing avalanches hit the slopes; rogue waves onboard a cruise liner; golf ball-sized hail and an EF2 tornado strike the beach.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: A young woman races for rescue as her boyfriend is trapped and slowly dying in a freezing Utah river; a hiker faces a fork in an Oregon trail, and the choice he makes leads to a five-day struggle for survival.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: A freak car accident leaves a man unable to move and fighting for his life, just a few hundred feet from a busy Houston highway; a skilled Florida hunter is out of his element, lost and alone in Alaska's punishing environment.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: A son's birthday present for his father turns a wilderness adventure into a life-or-death struggle against freezing weather and prowling grizzlies; a casual walk before work plunges a woman into a nightmare of raging rapids and swarms of insects.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: Sonny and the team from Steve's Towing fight to remove the wreckage of a dump truck embedded in an overpass on the 401; James Ireland faces a trailer threatening to cave in on his crew.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A freak storm unleashes a 100-car pileup east of Toronto, pushing Steve and Sonny to lead the recovery charge; Kevin fights a tough wreck after a trucker smashes into an orchard.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A massive multiple-semi crash in a tunnel forces the Coxon crew to clear a big mess in a tight space; Mark Haslett heads to the rescue when a woman is trapped on a dangerous stretch of the highway in Toronto.

programme.title: Backroad Truckers
programme.desc: Angela and Dave need to transport a tiny home from Saskatchewan to British Columbia in time for a wedding; Dave's obsessed with a military rotator that would expand his business, but he can't afford it unless he makes a devilish deal with Big Donny.

programme.title: Backroad Truckers
programme.desc: Dave and Angela are forced to put a recovery job with his new army rotator on hold, when they get a rescue call from a dangerous mountain trail; Dale and Craig renew their bad blood while on a mission together at a remote fire watchtower.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Using primitive skills like a zero-gravity bow drill and one-tree shelter, Creek teaches how to live like cavemen in Cave Country, KY; also learn to navigate through a bat-infested cave system to find food and water.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Creek and three pals repel down a cliff into Kentucky's Red River wilderness and are faced with surviving with just one arm.

programme.title: Prospectors
programme.desc: Joe Dorris pulls an overnight to protect his claim; Amanda Adkins sets a trap on Mt. Antero; Dwayne Hall defends against an unannounced visitor; Steve Brancato goes on the hunt for gold.

programme.title: Prospectors
programme.desc: Dwayne makes a big gamble; Amanda mines in a treacherous spot; the Dorris family digs for topaz; Steve mines for blue barite.

programme.title: Prospectors
programme.desc: Prospectors race up the mountain after a grueling winter; Dwayne teaches two new mining buddies the ropes; Amanda hits big as rare tornados bear down on her; The Busse's camp is vandalized, and they hunt aquas to recoup their losses.

programme.title: Top Ten Heroes & Survivors
programme.desc: Getting caught in extreme weather can lead to dire and dangerous circumstances, but for those who find themselves trapped by ferocious conditions, the spirit to survive, or a heroic helping hand, is often the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Top Ten Unlucky Locations
programme.desc: With the right meteorological mix, extreme weather can strike anywhere at any time; its wrath appears to be random, but sometimes it comes back to the same spot again and again.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Saved
programme.desc: Over four episodes `Saved' retells the stories of everyday heroes. The inspiring events discussed involve courageous people who have risked their own lives to save others in times of peril. Drama reconstructions portray the incidents as they happened, with commentary and interviews with those saved and their saviours. Caught between life and death, these strangers had seconds to act as they bravely put their lives on the line and made a crucial difference. The first episode relives a moment, thousands of feet up in the air, as a group of six parachutists prepare for a routine jump. When one of the parachutists gets tangled in a chord his jump goes tragically wrong, leaving him dangerously hanging from the aircraft.

programme.title: River of No Return
programme.desc: (1954) Western with Robert Mitchum and Marilyn Monroe. An ex-con and a saloon singer steer a raft through hostile territory to face a showdown with her crooked fiancé. With Rory Calhoun.

programme.title: Sailor of the King
programme.desc: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: (2004) Drama. Dennis Quaid stars as the captain of an aircraft downed in the desert. There's no hope of rescue, unless he and the survivors can build another plane from the wreckage.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: (2023) It's a Robert McCall recall as Denzel Washington tackles the mob in Italy for the 'final chapter' of the ultra-violent vigilante action franchise. Fatti sotto! Antoine Fuqua directs.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: (2020) Action-comedy starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence. Just when Marcus is planning to retire, a vengeful drug lord's son shoots Mike. Can our dynamic duo beat the cartel?

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: (1987) Crime thriller set in a 1980s London nightclub. A bloody turf war erupts between East End gangsters and violent wide boys over US investment dollars. Strong language/ violence.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: (2019) Fun-filled family comedy starring John Cena. A macho fireman has to babysit three impish kids after saving them from a blaze in the remote California woodlands.

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: (1961) Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel. Two men fleeing the US Civil War find an island inhabited by monsters (animated by Ray Harryhausen) and the mysterious Captain Nemo.

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: (1971) Film version of the popular comedy series set in 1940. The Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard, led by Arthur Lowe's Captain Mainwaring, bumble through a series of misadventures.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: (1998) Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: (1996) Blockbusting landmark sci-fi action-thriller starring Will Smith and Jeff Goldblum. A US Air Force pilot and a scientist battle aliens who are spectacularly destroying our planet.

programme.title: Big Trouble in Little China
programme.desc: (1986) John Carpenter's tongue-in-cheek martial-arts romp starring Kurt Russell and Kim Cattrall. Can a truck driver rescue his girlfriend from a sorcerer before she loses her eyes?

programme.title: Ready or Not
programme.desc: (2019) Wickedly funny comedy horror starring Samara Weaving. A bride finds herself being hunted down by her new in-laws when she's asked to observe a deadly family tradition.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the Midlands
programme.desc: (2002) Drama. Robert Carlyle and Rhys Ifans fight for the love of a woman (Shirley Henderson) in Shane Meadows' modern-day western set in... Nottingham.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Mr Popper's Penguins
programme.desc: (2011) Family comedy. Jim Carrey stars as a work-obsessed New York property developer whose life is turned upside down when he receives a crate containing six live penguins.

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes:...
programme.desc: ...Talking Film: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: (1966) Bing Crosby and Ann-Margret star in this remake of John Ford's classic western. A group of disparate strangers are thrown together while travelling through dangerous territory.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead...
programme.desc: ...Reckoning Part 1 Interview Special: Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Simon Pegg and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about the spectacular seventh film in the action-adventure series.

programme.title: I, Robot
programme.desc: (2004) Sci-fi thriller with Will Smith. In 2035, a technophobic cop investigates a crime that may have been perpetrated by a robot. Can he keep an open mind?

programme.title: Tombstone
programme.desc: (1993) Western. Kurt Russell stars in the story of legendary Wild West lawman Wyatt Earp told through the medium of the moustache. With Val Kilmer as 'Doc' Holliday and Charlton Heston.

programme.title: Peppermint
programme.desc: (2018) Revenge thriller with Jennifer Garner. A mum turns vigilante on a quest for justice when her husband and daughter are murdered by a drug cartel.

programme.title: Two of Us
programme.desc: (2019) Romantic drama about two 70-something women who've been secret lovers for decades, and the difficulty one of them has coming out to her adult kids. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Being Marcus
programme.desc: Marcus loves swimming but is too self-conscious to take off his top in public. Will a mastectomy give him the confidence he needs to go for his first swim since he was a teenager?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Tomahawk
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes:...
programme.desc: ...Talking Film: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections.

programme.title: The Bravados
programme.desc: (1958) Brooding western starring Joan Collins and Gregory Peck. A man hunts down the four escaped prisoners who he believes are responsible for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: The Lady Eve
programme.desc: (1941) Screwball romcom with Barbara Stanwyck and Henry Fonda. A con artist is forced to change tack when she falls for her mark and he dumps her for trying to con him in the first place.

programme.title: Jubal
programme.desc: (1956) Western with Glenn Ford, Ernest Borgnine, Rod Steiger and Valerie French. A cowboy is given a job by a rancher, sparking lethal jealousy in a colleague and desire in the boss's wife.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

programme.title: Walking and Talking
programme.desc: (1996) Comedy with Catherine Keener and Anne Heche. A successful woman's best friend is getting married - making her feel unlucky in love. But is everything as rosy as it at first seems?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: (1955) Western. Clark Gable plays a Civil War veteran who, with his brother (Cameron Mitchell), accepts the role of trail boss on a huge cattle drive for a crooked cattleman (Robert Ryan).

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: The Sheriff of Fractured Jaw
programme.desc: (1959) Comedy western with Kenneth More. An English gunsmith decides the Wild West is the best market for his wares, but little does he expect to end up sheriff of a lawless frontier town.

programme.title: Earth vs the Flying Saucers
programme.desc: (1956) Sci-fi thriller. Hugh Marlowe stars as a scientist who discovers Earth is threatened by a fleet of flying saucers bent on global conquest. With special effects by Ray Harryhausen.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: (2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.

programme.title: Let Him Go
programme.desc: (2020) Neo-western with Kevin Costner. After losing their only son, a retired sheriff and his wife try to save their former daughter-in-law from her abusive partner.

programme.title: Never Grow Old
programme.desc: (2019) Gritty revisionist western with Emile Hirsch as an undertaker who's somewhat conflicted when an outlaw played by John Cusack starts dropping bodies in a previously God-fearing town.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Twelve Hours: Fantasy espionage series. Richard and Sharron seem to be safe after their latest assignment protecting a foreign leader, but they are soon proven wrong. S1 Ep13

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Slug Me Baby One More Time: US robot combat series. Eight teams - including local favourite Jackpot - throw down the gauntlet to battle for a spot in the Tournament of Champions. S7 Ep35

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: The Look: Classic US action drama series. Thomas attempts to help a Saigon disc jockey who is trying to trace her missing ex-fiance and has become the victim of abusive phone calls. S4 Ep9

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Operation: Silent Night: Classic US action drama series. Thomas, Higgins, TC and Rick get stranded at Christmas on an island that is about to become target practice for the US Navy. S4 Ep10

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Hors de Combat: Classic detective series. Two rival underworld gangs prove to be a test for the mismatched duo as Makepeace is forced to save more than just Dempsey's skin. S1 Ep5

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: All in a Day's Pork: Classic drama. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material. S4 Ep12

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The Search: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions have to race against time when London is threatened with devastation by a criminal organisation armed with a nuclear submarine. S1 Ep14

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Smaller They Are: Comedy-drama series. Arthur and Terry get involved with a small-time crook who manages to steal a suitcase that turns out to be full of suspect money. S1 Ep3

programme.title: Aussie Pickers
programme.desc: Furphy Man: The first episode of the Australian American Pickers spin-off. Salvage experts Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald visit a collector who specialises in Furphy water carts. S1 Ep1

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Adventurer and motorcycle enthusiast Henry Cole returns with the motorbike magazine show as he learns how to trials ride with Dougie Lampkin and has a go at sidecar riding. S4 Ep1

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Deadly Melt: Last year, as temperatures rose, flowing ice from the Yukon River nearly wiped out a village. Now, the DOT are racing to stop an overflow that could take out the Dalton. S4 Ep15

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Wheelbarrows and Tiptree Jam: Discover how one firm makes the wheelbarrows that helped rebuild Britain, then visit the family farm making jam for the Queen's breakfast table. S1 Ep17

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: For Better or Worse: Comedy-drama series. Dennis goes back to collect documents but doesn't realise that it's part of a ploy, and Barry takes decisive action on his wedding plans. S2 Ep12

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Metal Madness: US robot combat series. Beta tries to bash through the impenetrable armour of Black Dragon, and sparks fly as Bloodsport and Rotator clash in a ferocious Main Event. S7 Ep16

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
